0.details:
I am thanking Mark whom is a good friend.
They gave some money to John to help him out over paying a bill.
Paying the bill meant his gas and electricity would not be cut off.
This greatly helped John- who is also a friend of mine.
0.model_generation:
Dear Mark,

I wanted to express my heartfelt gratitude for the generous support you provided to John. Your willingness to lend him funds for his overdue gas and electricity bill was kind and timely. Thanks to your help, John avoided having his utilities cut off during a difficult time, and it’s a world of difference for him.

Your generosity not only eased his burden but also highlighted what a remarkable friend you are. Acts like yours reflect genuine compassion and remind me of the importance of looking out for one another. John has expressed his profound appreciation, and I share in that gratitude wholeheartedly.

Please know how much your kindness is valued. I’m fortunate to count you among my closest friends, and I look forward to the opportunity to repay your generosity in the future. Thank you again for being such a supportive and caring friend.

Warm regards,  
Your friend,
0.final_version:
Hi Mark,
I would just like to take a moment to thank-you for your kindness and generosity. I am, of course, referring to the help you gave John financially the other day. It meant that he could pay his gas and electricity bill, so he would not be cut-off.
This was really important to John and he would have been really upset if the worst had happened. I know this because I have spoken to him myself and he has tole me how much this meant to him. he is a little shy and introvert and does not have the confidence to thank you himself- so he asked me to do this on his behalf.
So thanks, mate, for your generosity- it is much appreciated by us both. I think helping others is really important, and John has said to me he will repay you in two weeks, when he next gets paid from work.
From,
X.

1.details:
To my wife.
I know you are worried about your job interview for a promotion at work.
I know you are worried and stressed.
I want you to know that I love you and whatever the outcome you are wonderful.
Be confident- you deserve this and have all the right qualifications.
1.model_generation:
To my love,

I know you’re nervous about your promotion interview, and I can feel your stress. But please remember how incredible you are. You’ve dedicated yourself to growing your skills, and all your hard work has prepared you for this moment. You have the right qualifications, the passion, and the confidence to shine.

Take a deep breath, stand tall, and trust in your abilities. No matter what happens today, I believe in you completely. You are brilliant, resilient, and deserving of every opportunity. This interview is just one step in your journey, and you’ve already achieved so much.

I’m here for you—ready to listen, support you, and celebrate your victories, big or small. Rest well tonight, wake up refreshed, and walk into that room knowing you’ve got this. I love you, and I’m proud of you every single day. Stay confident and know that you’re my hero.
1.final_version:
To my darling Wife,
You know you are the light of my life.
On this important day I wanted to give you some words of reassurance, and advice. You are, of course, applying for a promotion at work and today it is your big interview.
I know you are worried and stressed over it all, and are in a bit of a state, and emotional.
Please listen to me- you are absolutely qualified for this progression. You have shown your employers your unique skills and commitment to the business. You have shown a team approach and no one has a bad word to say about you.
So, you can be confident and not shy to tell them all about your successes. Believe in yourself because that belief is just so totally justified and merited. You are amazing and those that are going to interview you will certainly see your qualities and your strengths.
Go for it- you are worth it! All my love.

2.details:
Letter to Fred- about death of his mum
Qualities of the mum- supportive and encouraging and very loving.
Stress good memories of mum
She will rest in peace with the Angles- both of us being religious.
2.model_generation:
Dear Fred,

I was deeply saddened to hear about your mum’s passing. She was such a supportive, encouraging, and loving presence in our lives. I will always cherish her warm hugs, her gentle words of encouragement when challenges arose, and the way she celebrated every small victory. I remember her laughter filling the room at family gatherings and her kindness in hosting us with delicious meals and heartfelt conversation.

Her spirit and kindness will live on in every heart she touched. Her unwavering faith comforted us all, and I take solace in believing she now rests peacefully with the Angels, watching over you as she always did here on earth. May the many happy memories you shared bring you strength and comfort in the days ahead.

You’re in my prayers, and I am here for you whenever you need a listening ear or a shoulder to lean on.

With love and prayers,
2.final_version:
Dear Fred,

I was deeply saddened to hear about your mum’s passing. She was such a supportive, encouraging, and loving presence in your life. I am sure you will always cherish her warm hugs, the words of encouragement when challenges arose, and how she celebrated every small victory. I remember her laughter filling the room at various gatherings and her kindness in hosting us now and again with Sunday lunch and great conversation.

Her spirit and kindness will live on in all those she knew. Her unwavering faith was an inspiration, and I know we will take solace in believing she now rests peacefully with the Angels, watching over you as she always did here on earth. May the many happy memories you shared bring you strength and comfort in the days ahead.

You’re in my prayers and the prayers of others at our Church, and I am here for you whenever you need a listening ear or a shoulder to lean on.

With love and prayers,

3.details:
To Mark- long time, no see!
I have got married and have two children! Whom would have thought that!
I became a solicitor after all- I recall telling you I wanted to do that from the age of 9!
Hope you are well and your dream of working in the media came true, Especially, you are happy and in good health.
3.model_generation:
Dear Mark,

Long time, no see! I’m writing to share some big news: I recently got married and now have two wonderful children—who would have thought it! After years of hard work, I finally qualified as a solicitor; can you believe I stuck with my childhood dream since age nine? Balancing casework with diaper duty keeps me busy, but my kids’ laughter brightens every day.

I hope you’ve been well and that your dream of working in the media has come true. Have you settled into a particular role or outlet? I’ve often thought of your passion for journalism and broadcasting, and I’d love to hear about your adventures. More importantly, I hope you’re happy and in good health. How is your partner and family?

Let’s catch up properly soon—perhaps over coffee or a video call. I’d really enjoy hearing what you’ve been up to lately.

Best wishes,
3.final_version:
Dear Mark,

Long time, no see! I’m writing to share some big news: I have got married and now have two wonderful children—who would have thought it! After years of hard work, I finally qualified as a solicitor; can you believe I fulfilled my childhood dream since age nine?! Balancing legal casework with diaper duty keeps me busy, but my kids’ laughter brightens every day.

I hope you’ve been well and that your dream of working in the media has come true. Have you settled into a particular role or outlet? I’ve often thought of your passion for journalism and broadcasting, and I’d love to hear about your work. More importantly, I hope you’re happy and in good health. How are things in general?

Let’s catch up properly soon—perhaps over coffee or a Zoom/Teams video call. I’d really enjoy hearing what you’ve been up to lately, and we can share all of our news together.

Best wishes,

likert.edit_type_other: Adding a few more little details- such as the video call being specified.-

4.details:
A tribute to my deceased friend. His name was Matthew.
He was always looking on the bright side of life and was a born optimist- which had an encouragement to others.
He was a loving husband and father to Emily and Rebecca.
He was a stalwart of the local Church and raised much money for it with his charitable work and fund raising.
He was much loved, especially amongst the Sunday School of the Church- for his humour and compassion, and listening ear.
4.model_generation:
Today we gather in gratitude and sorrow to honor Matthew, whose life was a testament to the power of optimism.

A born optimist, he saw hope in every challenge and shared that bright perspective with all who knew him. His enthusiasm was contagious; he lifted spirits with a warm smile, an encouraging word, or a hearty laugh. At home, he was the devoted husband of Emily and the loving father of Rebecca. His family was the center of his world, and he cherished every moment spent with them.

In our church community, Matthew was a stalwart pillar. Through fundraising and charitable work, he helped raise vital funds to support programs that touched many lives. Children in Sunday School adored his humor, compassionate heart, and patient listening ear.

Though he has left this world, his legacy of faith, generosity, and unwavering hope remains. May we carry forward his radiant spirit every day.
4.final_version:
Today we gather in gratitude and sadness to honour Matthew, whose life was a testament to the power of hope and faith..

A born optimist, he saw belief in every challenge and shared that bright perspective with all who knew him. His enthusiasm was contagious; he lifted spirits with a warm smile, an encouraging word, or a hearty laugh. At home, he was the devoted husband of Emily and the loving father of Rebecca. His family was the centre of his world, and he cherished every moment spent with them.

In our church community, Matthew was a stalwart pillar. Through fundraising and charitable work, he helped raise vital funds to support programs that touched many lives. Children in Sunday School adored his humor, compassionate heart, and patient listening ear.

Though he has left this world, his legacy of faith, generosity, and unwavering hope remains. May we carry forward his radiant spirit every day.
May he rest in peace, and rise in glory.

likert.edit_type_other: Adding a traditional eulogy in the Church of England for the dead, specifically- May they rest in Peace, and Rise in Glory.

5.details:
To Jennifer- I am so sorry about my behaviour in that Italian restaurant last night.
I shouted at you because I thought you dismissed my worries about my job and I thought you were insincere,
I was under a lot of stress and pressure and I just lost it.
I know you were trying to be supportive but I was a bit off my head. I really value our friendship and it is important to me. Please forgive me! I will do anything to get us back on an even keel! Your friendship means the world to me.
5.model_generation:
Dear Jennifer,

I’m so sorry for my behavior at the Italian restaurant last night. I shouted at you because I felt you dismissed my worries about my job and I believed you were being insincere. I was under a lot of stress and pressure, and I let my emotions get the better of me. I realize now that I should have communicated my feelings calmly instead of reacting impulsively.

I know you were only trying to be supportive and caring, and I truly appreciate how hard you’ve listened and stood by me. My reaction was unfair to you and hurtful. I regret causing you pain.

Our friendship means the world to me, and I hope you can forgive me. I am committed to making things right and doing whatever it takes to rebuild your trust. Thank you for being there, and I hope we can move forward together.

Sincerely,
Your friend
5.final_version:
Dear Jennifer,

I’m so sorry for my behaviour at the Italian restaurant last night. I shouted at you because I (wrongly) felt you dismissed my worries about my job and I believed you were being insincere. I was under a lot of stress and pressure, and I let my emotions get the better of me. I realise now that I should have communicated my feelings calmly, instead of reacting as I did.

I know you were only trying to be supportive and caring, and I truly appreciate how hard you have listened and stood by me. My reaction was unfair to you and hurtful. I regret upsetting you and causing a bit of a scene in the restaurant.- to put it mildly!

Our friendship means the world to me, and I hope you can forgive me. I am committed to making things right and doing what it takes to rebuild your trust and friendship.. Thank you for being there in the past, and I really hope you will be there in the future- as I will also be there for you..

Sincerely,
Your friend

likert.edit_type_other: Correcting grammar- but only in the sense of writing in the UK style and not USA style for some words. I know correcting grammar is above but wanted to add more precise details.

post_survey.present_other: What I want to come across is emotional empathy and understanding of the person that I am writing to, or speaking of.
post_survey.mask_other: I do not want any impression of insincerity, or that I am writing from some sort of template. I want what I am writing to match my experiences with the individual, and anything contrary to that is something that I do not wish to give the impression of to the recipient, nor to anyone else.
post_survey.feedback: It was a challenge but most interesting. I enjoyed it, I am very competitive, and wanted to outdo everyone else!
